The '''Borgo asteroid belt''' was the location of a false [[berubian]] mine once owned by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].<ref name="TEC">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref>
